info.title: DevMarket API
info.description:
DevMarket REST API — e-commerce marketplace with products, categories, chat, and Stripe payments.

## Authentication
All protected endpoints use HttpOnly cookie authentication (`authToken`). After a successful login, include the cookie in all requests.

## Known Bugs
- `GET /chat` — not protected, but accesses `req.user._id`
- `GET /message` — not protected; chatId read from wrong source
- `POST /message` — chatId read from `req.params` (should be `req.body`)
- User model missing `stripeAccountId` — all checkouts fail
- `changeRole` controller has inverted OR logic — always rejects valid roles
- `deleteUser` has inverted logic — admins cannot delete other users

cookieAuth.name: authToken
cookieAuth.description: JWT token stored in HttpOnly cookie. Set via POST /auth/login or Google OAuth.

Unauthorized.description: No auth cookie or invalid token

example.message: Too many requests. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account and sends a verification email. Rate limit: 5 requests per 60 minutes.
Authenticates user and sets HttpOnly `authToken` cookie. Rate limit: 5 requests per 15 minutes.

400.description: Invalid credentials or account not verified

get.description: Verifies user email via token from verification email link. Rate limit: 3 requests per 10 minutes.

400.description: Missing, invalid, or already verified token

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user based on the authToken cookie.
Redirects to Google authentication page. Scope: profile, email.
Handles Google OAuth callback. Sets authToken cookie and redirects to CLIENT_URL.

302.description: Redirect to client app after successful auth

get.description: Public endpoint. Returns all users sorted by creation date (newest first).

delete.description: Sets isDeleted=true and deletedAt. User can only delete own account (admin role check has a bug — currently admins cannot delete others).

patch.description: Update fullname, email, password, or avatar. User can only edit own profile. Changing email resets isVerified and sends a new verification link.
Changes the role of a user. Admin only. Cannot change another admin's role. **BUG:** role validation logic is inverted — all valid role values are currently rejected.

get.description: Public endpoint. Returns products with populated category, sellerId, comments, and reviews.

post.description: Creates a product under the specified category. Requires seller or admin role. Up to 5 images. Category must be active and attributes must match category's allowedAttributes.

description.example: High-performance gaming laptop with RTX 4090 and 32GB RAM

patch.description: Updates product fields. Only the product owner (seller) can edit. If new images are provided, old ones are deleted from Cloudinary.

delete.description: Deletes a product from DB and removes all images from Cloudinary. Product owner or admin can delete.

get.description: Public endpoint. Returns categories with populated parentCategory.

post.description: Creates a category with an image uploaded to Cloudinary. Image is required (will crash without it — BUG: no null check on req.file).

patch.description: Updates category fields. If a new image is provided, the old one is deleted from Cloudinary.

delete.description: Deletes category and its image from Cloudinary. BUG: crashes on non-existent ID (no null check).

500.description: Crash on non-existent ID (bug — no null check)

get.description: Returns all chats where the current user is buyer or seller. **BUG:** route defined before protect middleware — unauthenticated requests crash the server.

post.description: Creates a chat between the current user (buyer) and a seller about a product. Idempotent — returns existing chat if one already exists for same product+seller+buyer combination.

delete.summary: Delete chat and all its messages
delete.description: Deletes a chat and all associated messages. **Security note:** no ownership check — any authenticated user can delete any chat.

get.description: **BUG (×2):** (1) Route not protected — no auth required. (2) Controller reads chatId from req.params but route has no :chatId param — chatId is always undefined → always returns empty array. After fix, chatId should come from query param.

parameters.name: chatId
parameters.description: Chat ID (will work after bug fix — currently reads from req.params which is undefined)

post.description: Sends a message in a chat. Emits socket.io 'newMessage' event. **BUG:** controller reads chatId from req.params but route has no :chatId param — message is created with chat: undefined.

content.example: Hello, is this item still available?

delete.description: Deletes a message. Only the sender can delete their own messages. Emits socket.io 'deleteMessage' event.

patch.description: Updates message content. Only the sender can edit. Emits socket.io 'editMessage' event. Note: empty content string is treated as no-op (content not updated).

post.description: Creates a Stripe checkout session for a cart of products. Platform takes 5% commission. The seller stripeAccountId gate and Stripe Connect transfers are currently commented out, so checkout succeeds without connected seller accounts. Creates a pending Payment (the Order is created later by the webhook). Rate limited.

quantity.description: Must be a positive integer (not float)

userInfo.description: Shipping / contact info, persisted on the Payment and copied to the Order

400.description: Invalid quantity or seller missing Stripe account

value.message: All sellers must have a Stripe account connected before checkout.

post.description: Receives Stripe webhook events. Uses raw body for signature verification. Handles: checkout.session.completed (marks payment succeeded, creates transfers) and payment_intent.payment_failed.

example.message: Webhook error: No signatures found matching...

get.description: Case-insensitive regex search on user fullname. **BUG:** queries `name` field but User model uses `fullname` — always returns empty. No input escaping — potential ReDoS.

get.summary: Search products by title or description
get.description: Case-insensitive regex search on both title and description. No input escaping — potential ReDoS.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Searches in both title AND description fields

get.summary: Search categories by name or description
get.description: Case-insensitive regex search on both name and description. No input escaping — potential ReDoS.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Searches in both name AND description fields

get.description: Paginated reviews for a product. Public route (no auth). Note: reviewsCount is the total DB review count, not per-product (bug).

post.description: Creates a Comment + Review and increments product.universal.reviewsCount. Auth required. Rate limited 5/10min. No one-review-per-user constraint.

patch.description: Owner-only edit. content/rating both optional. Admins cannot edit others' reviews. Rate limited 10/10min.

delete.description: Owner or admin can delete. Decrements product.universal.reviewsCount. Rate limited 10/10min.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's own orders (paginated). Note: orderCount is total DB order count, not per-user (bug). There is no create-order endpoint — orders are created by the Stripe webhook after a paid checkout.

patch.description: Admin-only. No body validation — invalid status caught by Mongoose enum on save. Rate limited 15/10min.

delete.description: Owner-only delete (no admin override). Rate limited 10/10min.
